˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

"This happened a long time ago—so long ago that even the memories had faded, like washed-out ink on an old postcard. Ivan thought he would never see you again, that you had stayed somewhere back there, in the past, behind a tightly shut door that he himself had slammed. But fate, as always, turned out to be an ironic bitch who loves throwing unexpected surprises."
creator: lumine69
